instruction: Reverse the traversal direction within each anti-diagonal. Instead of collecting elements from top-right to bottom-left (increasing row order), collect them from bottom-left to top-right (decreasing row order). The order of the diagonals in the outer list remains unchanged; only the inner element order within each diagonal is reversed. For example, antidiagonals([[1, 2], [3, 4]]) currently returns [[1], [2, 3], [4]]; the transformed version must return [[1], [3, 2], [4]] (the middle diagonal [2, 3] becomes [3, 2]).
